channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: I have good news and bad news about Windows 11 24H2’s new update: it introduces nifty features and fixes... but also includes another ad
item.description: Tired of ads in Windows 11 yet? I know I am, but Microsoft looks to be bringing in yet another, and this time it’s referrals for PC Game Pass.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: A convincing Google Pixel 9a hands-on video has mysteriously disappeared, but I think it could’ve been the real thing
item.description: A YouTuber released, and subsequently pulled, a short vertical video of a hands-on with the Google Pixel 9a, and it’s probably the best look at the new mid-range handset we've had so far.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Your next Android phone could get up to eight years of software updates – but there are catches
item.description: Android phones running the Snapdragon 8 Elite chip will get up to eight years of software and security support, with more to come.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: As Microsoft innovates, Apple stagnates
item.description: Microsoft and Apple were once the yin and yang of the tech world. Microsoft was dull and plodding, milking buggy, barely-good-enough-for-prime-time Windows for tremendous profits, thanks to a worldwide operating system monopoly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cómo pueden los CIO ayudar a que el futuro sea menos desagradable que el presente
item.description: Los CIO que quieran prosperar en el futuro deben escapar de un presente poco celebrado. La tecnología en general ha perdido popularidad. La ciencia ficción ha sido invadida por la distopía y los escenarios apocalípticos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Consumers are connected more than ever before
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Sowmyanarayan Sampath, Fast Company

item.title: Three Tropical Cyclones Churn in South Pacific
item.description: Scientists say it's unusual to have three tropical cyclones spinning in the South Pacific at once.
item.dc:creator: Isabella O'Malley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New Relic boosts observability platform with AI intelligence
item.description: New Relic announced updates to its Intelligent Observability Platform this week, which the company says will enable a unified view of system relationships and dependencies and intelligently connect technical systems with business context.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's AI Chip Sales Under Scrutiny Amid Chinese Rivalry
item.description: Nvidia's artificial intelligence chip sales will be top of mind when the company releases its latest financial results, with analysts eyeing future demand amid a Chinese upstart's claim that it can train competitive AI models using far fewer resources.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: 5 time-saving Alexa commands you’re probably not using yet
item.description: Even if you’re a regular Alexa user, there’s a good chance you haven’t discovered some of its most efficient features. Actually, strike that: There’s a good chance you’re only using your Alexa device to set timers and play music.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: North Korean Hackers Linked to $1.5 Billion Cryptocurrency Heist
item.description: North Korean hackers have been linked to a sophisticated hack that stole approximately $1.5 billion worth of digital currency from Bybit, a major cryptocurrency exchange.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Apple shareholders reject proposal to scrap company's diversity programs
item.description: Apple shareholders rebuffed an attempt to pressure the technology trendsetter into joining President Donald Trump’s push to scrub corporate programs designed to diversify its workforce.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Intel targets edge, high-performance computing with extended Xeon 6 chip line
item.description: Intel has expanded its Xeon 6 line of processors, adding models 6700/6500 for high-performance cores and edge computing devices to the family. The new Xeon 6 processors feature Performance-cores (P-cores) for high performance computing.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: US intensifies scrutiny of the EU’s Digital Markets Act
item.description: In a significant escalation of transatlantic tensions over tech regulation, US House Judiciary Chairman Jim Jordan has demanded clarification from the EU antitrust chief Teresa Ribera regarding the enforcement of the EU’s digital marketplace rules, citing concerns about potential discrimination agai
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This is what they never told you about online privacy
item.description: Understanding the language of the internet can help you protect your personal information from bad actors. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Harrison Ford addresses AI fears
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World
